title: The Legend of Magic Outfit Episode 13 Indonesia, English Sub
description:
English

Qinglu Academy was once the most glorious magic academy in the Martial Magic Continent. However, after the Old Dean of the Academy traveled west by riding a crane, he faced disaster. He was attacked by a group of powerful people led by former traitor Mo Tianxiong. Seven to eight Academy Inheritance treasures including the "Qinglu Magic Outfit" in the city courtyard. Since then, Qinglu Academy has been suppressed by other academies, and has been declining. Seeing the academy in danger, Disciple Li Qinglu who was very close to Qinglu Academy, joined the academy and was determined that he would lead Qinglu Academy back to being the top Academy. To regain the former supreme glory of Qinglu Academy. Of course, the Geniuses of the various Academies wouldn't give Li Qinglu such an opportunity. They oppressed the weak. Then tried to evade Li Qinglu, but Li Qinglu stepped on all of them, and finally regained the "Magic Outfit Qinglu" that was scattered across the various Academies.

Indonesia

Akademi Qinglu dulunya adalah akademi sihir paling mulia di Benua Magic Martial. Namun, setelah Dekan Tua Akademi melakukan perjalanan ke barat dengan menaiki bangau, dia menghadapi bencana. Dia diserang oleh sekelompok orang kuat yang dipimpin oleh mantan pengkhianat Mo Tianxiong. Tujuh sampai delapan harta Warisan Akademi termasuk âMagic Outfit Qingluâ di halaman kota. Sejak itu, Akademi Qinglu telah ditindas oleh akademi lain, dan semakin menurun. Melihat akademi dalam bahaya, Murid Li Qinglu yang sangat dekat dengan Akademi Qinglu, bergabung dengan akademi dan bertekad akan memimpin Akademi Qinglu kembali menjadi Akademi teratas. Untuk mendapatkan kembali kejayaan tertinggi sebelumnya Akademi Qinglu. Tentu saja, para Jenius dari berbagai Akademi tidak akan memberikan kesempatan seperti itu kepada Li Qinglu. Mereka menindas yang lemah. Lalu mencoba untuk menghindar dari Li Qinglu, tetapi Li Qinglu menginjak mereka semua, dan akhirnya mendapatkan kembali âMagic Outfit Qingluâ yang tersebar di berbagai Akademi.

The Legend of Magic Outfit Subtitle Indonesia, English, Portuguese, Turkish, Spanish, Italian, Polish, Arabic, Thai, German
